title: National Encryption Policy
summary: UAE Cyber Security Council policy mandating national encryption controls and requiring entities to protect information from future quantum-computing threats, including approved transition plans from traditional encryption to post-quantum cryptography. Underpinned by an issued executive regulation.

title: UAE announces approval of National Encryption Policy
summary: Official Emirates News Agency report on the UAE's approval of the National Encryption Policy and issuance of its executive regulation, calling on government entities to develop officially approved transition plans from traditional encryption to post-quantum cryptography.

title: UAE Cyber Security Council partners with QuantumGate to launch national Crypto Discovery Tool
summary: Official Abu Dhabi Media Office announcement that the UAE Cyber Security Council partnered with QuantumGate on a national Crypto Discovery Tool, customised to UAE National Cryptography Center requirements, as part of the National Post-Quantum Migration Programme to direct migration to post-quantum cryptography.

title: UAE Cyber Security Council partners with ATRC to advance national post-quantum security transition
summary: ATRC announcement of a partnership with the UAE Cyber Security Council to advance the national transition to post-quantum security, including deployment of QuantumGate's Crypto Discovery Tool across critical national infrastructure.

title: UAE Cybersecurity Council advances national readiness for future quantum threats with ATRC's QuantumGate
summary: ATRC announcement that the UAE Cyber Security Council is advancing national readiness against future quantum threats using ATRC's QuantumGate platform to support migration to quantum-safe / post-quantum cryptography.

title: Technology Innovation Institute contributes to post-quantum cryptographic standardisation via NIST digital signature schemes
summary: ATRC/TII news that its Cryptography Research Centre contributed post-quantum digital signature schemes (MiRitH, PERK, RYDE) to NIST's call for additional PQC digital signatures, reflecting national research capacity in post-quantum standardisation.

title: Abu Dhabi's Technology Innovation Institute unveils first post-quantum cryptography library in UAE
summary: Official Abu Dhabi Media Office report that TII's Cryptography Research Centre launched the first post-quantum cryptography software library in the UAE, guarding against quantum-computer attacks and integrated into secure communication products.

title: Abu Dhabi's Technology Innovation Institute unveils first post-quantum cryptography library in UAE (WAM)
summary: Official Emirates News Agency report on TII's Cryptography Research Centre launching the first post-quantum cryptography software library in the UAE.

title: Dubai Electronic Security Center launches Post-Quantum Cryptography Guideline at GISEC Global 2025
summary: DESC announcement that it launched a Post-Quantum Cryptography Guideline at GISEC Global 2025 to prepare Dubai's digital infrastructure against emerging quantum-computing threats.

title: Abu Dhabi's TII unveils first post-quantum cryptography library in UAE (TII)
summary: TII (applied research pillar of the government's Advanced Technology Research Council) announcement that its Cryptography Research Centre launched the first post-quantum cryptography software library in the UAE.

title: UAE Cyber Security Council Partners with ATRC to Advance National Post-Quantum Security Transition
issuingOrg: Abu Dhabi Media Office / UAE Cyber Security Council
summary: Official Abu Dhabi Media Office announcement (13 May 2026) that the UAE Cyber Security Council signed an agreement with the Advanced Technology Research Council (consolidated via VentureOne) to deploy and scale quantum-safe / post-quantum solutions supporting one of the world's first coordinated national post-quantum migration plans, drawing on TII cryptographic libraries, QuantumGate's Crypto Discovery Tool and entanglement-based QKD. This is the Abu Dhabi Media Office rendering of the partnership (distinct URL from the ATRC.gov.ae version already stored).

title: CyberQ: Cyber Security in the Quantum Era conference shapes dialogue on industry challenges from Abu Dhabi
issuingOrg: Abu Dhabi Media Office / UAE Cyber Security Council
summary: Official Abu Dhabi Media Office report (15 November 2024) on the CyberQ conference organised by the UAE Cyber Security Council and Technology Innovation Institute, stating that post-quantum cryptography is the optimal solution for countering future quantum-computer threats and announcing strategic PQC partnerships (CSC, TII, QuantumGate). Surfaced now as it is not yet in the corpus.

title: TII Researchers Contribute to NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography Standardization
summary: Technology Innovation Institute news that its Cryptography Research Centre researchers advanced six digital signature schemes (including LESS, Mirath, PERK, RYDE, SDitH, SQISign) to Round 2 of NIST's Post-Quantum Cryptography standardisation of additional digital signatures, reflecting domestic research capacity. Distinct tii.ae URL not already in the corpus; flagged for review as tii.ae is not on the trusted-domains list.
